title: The Nightmare Stalker (dweller)
description: The Nightmare Stalker is a mod that introduces a new creature called the Nightmare Stalker. This entity is a powerful and frightening enemy that appears in caves and on the surface attacking players.
body:
![Nightmare Stalker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec8fc8a2d8679625c4b4fd47327b6b136e5d5d61.png)


 Português: 
The Nightmare Stalker é uma versão mutilada do cave dweller. Ele irá caçar você sempre que puder.

Atualmente é compatível com Cave Dweller, Cave Dweller Evolved ou Reimagined Cave Dweller.

Requer GeckoLib

Meu Canal no Youtube:
[https://www.youtube.com/@Guiishw](https://www.youtube.com/@Guiishw)

Server do Discord para reportar bugs:
[Servidor do Discord](https://discord.gg/7URmPHcgS7)

Instale o mod Configured para que ele apareça apenas em cavernas e à noite

 ENGLISH:
The Nightmare Stalker is a mangled version of the cave dweller. It will hunt you what ever chance it gets.

Is currently compatible with the Cave Dweller, Cave Dweller Evolved or the Reimagined Cave Dweller.

Requires GeckoLib

My Youtube channel:
[https://www.youtube.com/@Guiishw](https://www.youtube.com/@Guiishw)

Discord server for reporting bugs:
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/7URmPHcgS7)

Install the Configured mod to make it only spawn in caves and at night
